title: Leeto la Bohwa go ralala Diprofense tsa Afrika Borwa
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Mphato wa 5 - Kgato ya Magareng
slides.title: Leeto la Bohwa go ralala Diprofense tsa Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: A re sepeleng go ralala diprofense ka moka tse senyane gomme re utolle mafelo a kgethegilego, dikanegelo le meetlo yeo e lego ya rena ka moka.

media.alt: Mmapa wo o thadilwego wa Afrika Borwa wo o nago le mebala, o na le dintlha tse di swaigago mafelo a bohwa go ralala naga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amogela barutwana gomme o hlalose kgopolo ya 'leeto la bohwa' - leeto la boikgopolelo leo le emago mafelong a kgethegilego go ralala Afrika Borwa ka moka. Botsisa: na go na le motho yo a kilego a etela musiamo, moago wa kgale, sekwele goba lefelo la tlhago? Leeto la bohwa le kgokaganya mafelo a mmogo. Mafelelong a thuto barutwana ba swanetse go kgona go bolela mafelo a bohwa diprofenseng tse di fapafapanego le go bolela lebaka leo re a šireletsago ka lona.

slides.title: Bohwa ke eng?
slides.lead: Bohwa ke dilo ka moka tseo re di hwetsago go tswa nakong e fetilego gomme re nyaka go di boloka bakeng sa bokamoso.

blocks.text: **Bohwa** ke dilo tseo re di hwetsago go tswa go batho bao ba phetsego pele ga rena. E ka ba dilo tseo re ka di kgwathago, go swana le meago ya kgale le didiriswa, le dilo tseo re ka se di kgwatheng, go swana le dikoša, dikanegelo, maleme le diritsipi. Bohwa bo re thusa go tseba gore re bomang le gore re tswa kae.

items: **Bohwa bja tlhago** - dithaba, mekoti, dinoka le diphoofolo tse di kgethegilego.
**Bohwa bja setso** - meago, dikwele, bokgabo le dilo tsa kgale.
**Bohwa bjo bo phelago** - maleme, mmino, mebino, dijo le meletlo.

media.alt: Diswantsho tse tharo tse bonolo: thaba, moago wa kgale le moropa, di bontsha mehuta e meraro ya bohwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fa mehlala e kwešišegago bakeng sa mohuta o mongwe le o mongwe gore barutwana ba Mphato wa 5 ba kgone go e bona: tlhago (Thaba ya Table), setso (Meago ya Union), bjo bo phelago (opelo ya isicathamiya, braai ya lapa, go anega ditsotshelo). Gatelela gore bohwa bjo bo phelago bo phela ka bathong, e sego moagong. Laletsa barutwana go bolela sengwe sa bohwa go tswa malapeng a bona.

slides.eyebrow: Mafelo ao lefase ka moka le a šireletsago
slides.title: Mafelo a Bohwa bja Lefase a Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: A mangwe a mafelo a rena a kgethegile kudu mo lefase ka moka le thusago go a hlokomela.

blocks.text: **Lefelo la Bohwa bja Lefase** ke lefelo leo le kgethilwego ke mokgatlo wo o bitswago **UNESCO** ka gobane le bohlokwa go batho ka moka lefaseng, e sego naga e tee fela. Afrika Borwa e na le mafelo a ka bago **lesome** a mohuta wo, a phatlaladitswe go ralala diprofense. Leetong la rena re tla etela a mangwe a wona.

items: A mangwe a kgethilwe ka baka la tlhago, go swana le dithaba tsa Kapa le Drakensberg.
A mangwe a kgethilwe ka baka la histori, go swana le Mapungubwe le Robben Island.
Go ba lelokelelong go ra gore lefelo le šireleditswe bakeng sa bana ba bokamoso.

media.alt: Baše e sedikadikwe yeo e nago le lefase ka gare, go swana le seswantsho sa Bohwa bja Lefase.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Boloka tlhaloso e bonolo: UNESCO ke sehlopha sa Ditšhaba tse Kopanego seo se dirago lelokelelo le le kgethegilego la mafelo a bohlokwa kudu lefaseng. Ga o nyake gore barutwana ba tsebe palo e nepagetsego - ntlha ke gore Afrika Borwa e humile ka mafelo a mohuta wo. [SME] Hle netefatsa palo ya bjale ya Mafelo a Bohwa bja Lefase a UNESCO a Afrika Borwa (e be e le lesome ka 2023) pele thuto e phatlalatswa.

slides.title: Boemo bo tee bja bohwa profenseng e nngwe le e nngwe
slides.lead: Diprofense tse senyane, mafelo a senyane a tumilego a go a etela leetong la rena.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - mekoti yeo e nago le marapo a batho a kgale kudu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - mmuso wa mathomo wa Afrika Borwa le tšhukudu ya gauta.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - kgolego yeo Nelson Mandela a bego a swaretswe go yona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Drakensberg - diketekete tsa diswantsho tsa maswika tsa Basarwa (San).

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu le Mthatha - mafelo a bjaneng bja Nelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Bohwa bja Basarwa (San) le go betla ga maswika a kgale nageng e omilego ya Karoo.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Metse ya Basotho le Vredefort Dome kgauswi.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, moo go hweditswego khukhwana ya kgale ya ngwana.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa tsa Barberton - a mangwe a maswika a kgale kudu lefaseng.

slides.notes: Se ke slaete ya kakaretso. Bala profense e nngwe le e nngwe le boemo bja yona ka lentsu le le kwagalago, gomme o šupe moo e ka bago gona mmapeng wa boikgopolelo (goba mmapa wa leboteng ge o na le wona). Botsa barutwana gore dislaete tse di latelago di tla lebelela a mangwe a mafelo a ka botlalo. O ka botsa morutwana yo mongwe le yo mongwe go kgetha boemo bjo a nyakago go bo etela le go bolela lebaka. [SME] Netefatsa dikamano tsa profense-le-lefelo di lokela klase ya gago; profense e nngwe le e nngwe e na le mafelo a mantsi a bohwa.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Sehlopha sa mekoti kgauswi le Johannesburg moo bo-radithuto ba hweditsego a mangwe a marapo a kgale kudu a lapa la batho lefaseng.

blocks.text: Kua **Mekoting ya Sterkfontein** bo-radithuto ba epolotse **marapo a fetogilego leswika** - marapo a batho ba mathomo bao ba bego ba phela dimilione tsa mengwaga tse fetilego. Dilo tse di tumilego tseo di hweditswego di akaretsa khukhwana yeo e reilwego 'Mrs Ples' le sekgato se se nago le marapo ka moka se se bitswago 'Little Foot'. Ke ka lebaka leo lefelo le bitswago *Cradle of Humankind* (Lefelo la Bjaneng bja Batho).

items: Sebjana sa bana (cradle) ke moo lesea le robalago - ka fao le se swana le lefelo la matswalo a batho.
Ke Lefelo la Bohwa bja Lefase ka gobane le anega kanegelo ya batho ka moka.
O sa dutse o ka etela mekoti le musiamo lehono.

media.alt: Karolwana ya ka gare ga mokoti wa ka fase wo o nago le khukhwana ya leswika ka gare.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa 'leswika la marapo' (fossil) ka mo go kwešišegago: marapo ao a fetogilego leswika ka go nanya nakong e telele kudu. Little Foot le Mrs Ples di dira gore mahlale a bonagale a le nnete go barutwana. Boloka kgopolo ya nako e telele e le bonolo - 'nako e telele kudu e fetilego, e telele go feta kamoo re ka e naganago.' Kgokaganya morago le karata ya slaete ya 5. [SME] Datamela di nolofaditswe ka boomo; netefatsa dipalo tseo morutisi a di tlaleletsago ka molomo.

slides.title: Mmuso wa Mapungubwe
slides.lead: Kgale kudu, godimo ga thaba ye e sephara ka leboa la kgole, go be go eme motse-mogolo wa mmuso wa mathomo wa Afrika Borwa.

blocks.text: Mengwaga e ka bago e 700 go ya go e 800 e fetilego, **Mapungubwe** e be e le mmuso wo o nago le mediro moo batho ba bego ba lema, ba rua dikgomo gomme ba gwebisana gauta le meno a tlou le dinaga tsa kgole. Kgoši e be e phela godimo ga thaba e kgethegilego. Ka morago bo-radikepelo ba hweditse dilo tse dibotse tsa gauta moo, go akaretswa **tšhukudu e nnyane ya gauta**.

items: E bontsha gore mebuso e megolo ya Afrika e be e le gona mo pele ga ge Maeuropa a fihla.
Tšhukudu ya gauta bjale ke leswao le le tumilego la histori ya Afrika Borwa.
Mapungubwe ke Lefelo la Bohwa bja Lefase mollwaneng le Zimbabwe le Botswana.

media.alt: Thaba e sephara godimo, ka pele ga yona go na le sebopego se se nnyane sa tšhukudu ya gauta.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Slaete ye e lokisa maaka ao a tlwaelegilego ka go bontsha mmuso wa Afrika o matla, o humilego, wo o bego o atlegile mo pele ga mehla ya bokoloni. Gatelela kgwebo (gauta le meno a tlou di sepela kgole ka lewatle) le tšhukudu ya gauta bjalo ka lehumo. Barutwana ba Mphato wa 6 ba ithuta Mapungubwe ka botlalo ka morago, ka fao o bjala peu. Boloka datamela di kwadilwe ('e ka bago mengwaga e 700-800 e fetilego').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Sehlakahlaka se se nnyane ka lewatleng kgauswi le Kapa seo se ilego sa fetoga kgolego e tumilego - le leswao la tokologo.

blocks.text: Mengwaga e mentsi **Robben Island** e be e le kgolego. Mehleng ya kgethollo, baetapele bao ba bego ba lwela ditokelo tse di lekanago ba be ba tswaletswe mo, kgole le malapa a bona. **Nelson Mandela** o feditse mengwaga e mentsi ka seleng se se nnyane sehlakahlakeng pele a lokollwa gomme ka morago a ba mopresidente wa mathomo wa Afrika Borwa yo a kgethilwego ka temokrasi.

items: Lehono ke musiamo wo o rutago baeti ka ntwa ya tokologo.
Bao ba tsamaišago baeti ke bagolegwa ba pele bao ba abelanago dikanegelo tsa bona.
E re gopotsa go tlotla tokologo le ditokelo tseo re nago le tsona lehono.

media.alt: Sehlakahlaka se se nnyane se se nago le lebone la lewatle, ka Thaba ya Table kgole.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Swara kgethollo ka tlhokomelo le ka bonolo bakeng sa Mphato wa 5: batho ba bangwe ba be ba swarwa gampe ka baka la mmala wa letlalo la bona, gomme batho ba sebete ba šoma go fetola seo. Bontsha Robben Island e le lefelo la manyami le kholofelo. Kgokaganya le Letsatsi la Tokologo / Nelson Mandela ge barutwana ba mo tseba. Efoga dintlha tse di šiišago; lebelela sebete le boleng bja tokologo.

slides.title: Diswantsho tsa Maswika tsa Drakensberg
slides.lead: Godimo dithabeng tsa Drakensberg go na le diketekete tsa diswantsho tseo di dirilwego ke Basarwa (San) kgale kudu.

blocks.text: **uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** ke mothaladi wa dithaba tse di godimo kudu wa Afrika Borwa. Mekoti ya wona le mahaus a maswika di na le diketekete tsa **diswantsho tsa maswika** tseo di dirilwego ke **Basarwa (San)** batsomi-ba-kgoboketsi. Ba be ba thala batho, diphofu (eland), le ditumelo tsa bona ba diriša mebala ya tlhago yeo e tswago maswikeng, dimeleng le diphoofolong.

items: Leina uKhahlamba le ra 'lešabi la marumo' ka Sezulu (isiZulu).
Diswantsho di na le makgolo le diketekete tsa mengwaga.
Ke Lefelo la Bohwa bja Lefase ka baka la tlhago le bokgabo bja yona bja kgale.

media.alt: Leboto la mokoti le na le diswantsho tsa maswika tsa Basarwa (San) tsa phofu le sebopego sa motho se se kitimago.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Tsebiša Basarwa (San) e le batho ba mathomo ba Afrika Borwa le bakgabi ba bokgoni le baanegi ba dikanegelo. Hlalosa kamoo mmala o bego o dirwa ka didirisiwa tsa tlhago (ochre, malahla, meetse a dimela, makhura a diphoofolo). Phofu (eland) e be e le phoofolo ya bohlokwa kudu ditumelong tsa Basarwa. Swara bohwa bja Basarwa ka tlhompho - diswantsho tse ke tse kgethwa go ditlogolwana. Kgokaganya le go betla ga maswika a Northern Cape slaeteng e latelago.

slides.title: Go ralala Karoo le Free State
slides.lead: Maemo a mangwe a mararo leetong la rena - Eastern Cape, Northern Cape le Free State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Meboto e metala moo Nelson Mandela a goletsego gona. Musiamo kua Mthatha o anega kanegelo ya bophelo bja gagwe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Thaba e apešitswego ka go betlwa ga maswika a kgale, e hlokomelwa ke ditšhaba tsa Basarwa (San) le Khoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Motse wa Basotho
blocks.text: Musiamo o phelago moo o ka bonago dintlo tsa setso tsa Basotho tse di nago le maboto a thadilwego a mabotse.

media.alt: Diponagalo tse tharo tse nnyane: meboto e mengwe, leswika le le betlilwego, le ntlwana e sedikadikwe e thadilwego.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Maemo a mararo a a atolosa leeto go diprofense tse dintsi le mehuta e mentsi ya bohwa: lefelo la matswalo a motho (Eastern Cape), bokgabo bja kgale (go betlwa ga maswika a Northern Cape, ao a betlilwego leswikeng go e na le go thalwa go lona), le bohwa bjo bo phelago motseng wo o šomago (Free State). Thala phapano gare ga diswantsho tsa maswika (KZN) le go betlwa ga maswika (Northern Cape). [SME] Emiša mafelo a selegae a Eastern Cape goba Free State ge a lokela barutwana ba gago gakaone.

slides.title: Maswika a kgale le ngwana wa kgale
slides.lead: Maemo a rena a mabedi a mafelelo a diprofense a ya North West le Mpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ka 1924 khukhwana ya leswika ya ngwana wa kgale, 'Taung Child', e hweditswe mo. E thusitse lefase go ithuta gore batho ba thomile Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Dithaba tsa Makhonjwa di na le a mangwe a maswika a kgale kudu lefaseng - a ka bago dimilione tse 3 500 tsa mengwaga - bjale ke Lefelo la Bohwa bja Lefase.

blocks.heading: Boputswa - Gauteng
blocks.text: Freedom Park le Constitution Hill ka leboa di gopola ntwa ya ditokelo tsa botho le temokrasi.

media.alt: Khukhwana e nnyane ya leswika kgauswi le dithaba tsa kgale tse di nago le makarolo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Taung e kgokaganya morago le sehlogo sa Cradle of Humankind - Afrika Borwa e bohlokwa kanegelong ya methomo ya batho. Barberton e bontsha bohwa bja tlhago bja mohuta o mongwe: maswika a kgale kudu. Karata ya boputswa e go dumelela go bolela mafelo a temokrasi a Gauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Netefatsa ngwaga wa go hwetšwa ga Taung Child (1924) le bogolo bja maswika bjo bo kwadilwego (e ka bago dimilione tse 3 500 tsa mengwaga) ge o di bolela ka molomo.

slides.eyebrow: Bohwa bjoo o ka bo kwago, wa bo latswa le go bo bina
slides.title: Bohwa bjo bo phelago le Letsatsi la Bohwa
slides.lead: Ga se bohwa ka moka bjo bo dulago musiamong - bjo bongwe bo phela dilong tseo re di dirago letsatsi le letsatsi.

blocks.text: **Bohwa bjo bo phelago** bo fetišetšwa go tswa go bomakgolo go ya go batswadi go ya go bana. Bo akaretsa **maleme a rena a semmušo a 11**, dikoša le mebino ya rena, dikanegelo tsa rena, diaparo tsa rena le dijo tseo re di ratago. Ngwaga o mongwe le o mongwe ka la **24 Setemere** Afrika Borwa e keteka **Letsatsi la Bohwa**, mola re hlompha ditso tsa rena ka moka tse di fapafapanego.

items: Mmino le mebino go swana le isicathamiya, opelo ya diphaka (gumboot) le amapiano.
Dijo tse di swanago le pap, bunny chow, koeksisters, umngqusho le chakalaka.
Dikanegelo, direto tsa go reta (izibongo) le dipapadi tse di abelanwago malapeng.

media.alt: Dinoutu tsa mmino, moropa le poleiti ya dijo tse di emelago bohwa bjo bo phelago.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dira gore ye e be slaete e nago le tirišano kudu. Botsa barutwana go abelana koša, sejo goba kanegelo go tswa malapeng a bona. Gatelela gore bohwa bjo bo phelago ke bja bohle gomme bo dula bo fetoga - amapiano ke bohwa bjo boswa bjo bo dirwago gona bjale. Hlalosa Letsatsi la Bohwa ka bonolo: letsatsi la maikhutšo la go keteka ditso tsa rena ka moka mmogo. Matlafatsa tlhompho ya diphapano.

slides.title: Go hlokomela bohwa bja rena
slides.lead: Bohwa ke bja rena ka moka, ka fao ka moka ga rena re swanetse go thusa go bo šireletsa.

blocks.text: Ge meago ya kgale e wa, diswantsho tsa maswika di ngwathwa, goba dikanegelo di sa hlwe di anegwa gape, bohwa bjoo bo lahlega go ile go ile. Ke ka lebaka leo re nago le **dimusiamo**, **dikwele** le melao yeo e šireletsago mafelo a kgethegilego. Eupša batho ba tlwaelo le bona ba a thusa - ka go etela, go ithuta le go fetišetša seo ba se tsebago.

items: O se ke wa kgwatha goba wa senya bokgabo bja maswika goba dilo tsa kgale.
Etela dimusiamo le mafelo a bohwa go ithuta dikanegelo tsa ona.
Theetsa bagolo gomme o fetišetse dikanegelo tsa bona go ba bangwe.

media.alt: Diatla tse pedi di swere moago o monnyane le sehlare ka boleta, di bontsha tlhokomelo ya bohwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tliša thuto go ntlha ya yona ya 'ka fao go bjang' - bohwa bo tšhabega gomme bo ka lahlega. Kgokaganya dikeletso tse tharo le maitshwaro a nnete leetong la sekolo. Matlafatsa tlhompho ya mafelo a kgethwa a go swana le bokgabo bja maswika bja Basarwa. O ka botsa barutwana go bolela selo se tee seo ba tla se dirago go šireletsa bohwa. Se se lokisetsa dipotšišo tsa tlhahlobo.

slides.eyebrow: Mafelelo a leeto - a re lebeleleng gape
slides.title: Seo re se ithutilego leetong
slides.lead: Re sepetse go ralala diprofense ka moka tse senyane gomme ra kopana le bohwa bja tlhago, bja setso le bjo bo phelago.

blocks.text: Go tloga mekoting ya **Cradle of Humankind** go ya mmusong wa **Mapungubwe**, kgolegong ya **Robben Island** le dithabeng tse di thadilwego tsa **Drakensberg**, bohwa bja Afrika Borwa bo anega kanegelo ya batho ba yona ka moka. Bohwa ke bja bohle, gomme bohle ba ka thusa go bo šireletsa.

blocks.question: Bolela mafelo a bohwa a mararo a a fapafapanego gomme o bolele gore lengwe le lengwe le profenseng efe.
Hlalosa phapano gare ga bohwa bja tlhago, bohwa bja setso le bohwa bjo bo phelago. Fa mohlala o tee wa mohuta o mongwe le o mongwe.
Ke ka lebaka lang go le bohlokwa go hlokomela bohwa bja rena? Fa mabaka a mabedi.

slides.notes: Diriša dipotšišo tse tharo bjalo ka mošomo wo o ngwadilwego goba poledišano ya klase. Potšišo 1 e lekola go gopola mafelo le diprofense; potšišo 2 e lekola kgopolo ya motheo ya mehuta e meraro ya bohwa; potšišo 3 e lekola kwešišo ya lebaka leo bohwa bo lego bohlokwa ka lona. Kabo ya maraka e latela setaele sa Kgato ya Magareng ya CAPS. Phetha ka go gopotsa barutwana gore le bona ke karolo ya bohwa bjo bo phelago bja Afrika Borwa.
